description: As a conference event planner, organize your upcoming feedback surveys in LimeSurvey (admin/Admin123!). Create three survey groups with the following details: 'Annual Tech Summit 2024' (Description: 'All surveys related to the Annual Tech Summit held in Austin, TX — November 2024', Sort order 2), 'Global Healthcare Innovation Forum 2024' (Description: 'Surveys for the Global Healthcare Innovation Forum held in Boston, MA — October 2024', Sort order 1), and 'Women in Leadership Conference 2024' (Description: 'Surveys for the Women in Leadership Conference held in Chicago, IL — December 2024', Sort order 3). In the 'Annual Tech Summit 2024' group, create an anonymized survey titled 'Post-Event Satisfaction Survey - Tech Summit 2024' featuring a question group 'Overall Event Experience'. This group must contain a List (Radio) question (Code: 'Q01') with the text 'How would you rate your overall experience at the Tech Summit 2024?' and five answer options: 1='Very Dissatisfied', 2='Dissatisfied', 3='Neutral', 4='Satisfied', and 5='Very Satisfied'.
